ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "customerOnboardingChannel": payload.customerOnboardingChannel, "productServiceType": payload.productServiceType, "customerOnboardingSchedule": "Standard", "prospectType": "INDIVIDUAL", "email" : payload.email, "phoneNumber" : payload.phoneNumber, "fullName" : payload.fullName }
